vulnerability.name: CVE-2023-45853
vulnerability.description: MiniZip in zlib through 1.3 has an integer overflow and resultant heap-based buffer overflow in zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64 via a long filename, comment, or extra field.

statements.impact_statement: The dataviewer backend (FastAPI/Uvicorn on python:3.12-slim) and frontend (nginx:1.29-alpine serving a static React bundle) do not invoke MiniZip's zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64 entry point. The vulnerable code path is reachable only when applications create ZIP archives via MiniZip; dataviewer reads parquet/MCAP/JSON datasets and does not produce ZIP output.
